{{/* go:code type Person struct { Name string; Age int; Account string } func getPerson(string) *Person func hash_cc(string, int) string */}} {{ }} {{ $string := "correct var name" }} {{ $string }} {{ $string := "can't do this" }} {{ $.Alternative }} {{ text := "new banner is needed" }} {{ define "earth" }} original yolo {{ end }} {{ template "earth" }} {{ define "earth" }} fake yolo {{ end }} {{ }} {{ "Gianis" | printf "hello %s" }} {{ printf 23 34}} {{ and ( $namer := 2 ) 23 $namer | not }} {{ define "new_tower" }} {{ define "another_tower" }} {{ end }} {{ block "another_tower" . }} {{ end }} {{ template "earth" }} {{ template "moon" }} {{ end }} {{ template "another_tower" . }} // out of scope template call {{ define "moon" }} {{ template "new_tower" }} {{ end }} {{ template "new_tower" }} {{ if and (eq 23 3.0) (len .Slice) }} {{ end }} {{ (getPerson "penny").Account }} {{range $k, $v := .Wizards }} {{$k}}: {{printf "%#v" $v}} {{ }} {{ if eq $k 5 }} {{ break }} {{ end }} {{ else }} No wizard found {{end}} {{ with $.Info }} hash = {{ hash_cc .Tag .Version }} {{ else }} No information found ! {{ $.Info }} {{ end }} {{if (gt (len (printf "%v" .Anything)) 10)}}BIG{{end}} {{ "hello world" | printf "%s!!!" | printf "%q" | html }} {{ or nil 3455 }}
